# DomainNordic

> DomainNordic is an independent domain advisory group serving the Nordic markets through four locally rooted brands. The group provides strategic domain advisory services to businesses that view domains as long term assets rather than commodity registrations.

DomainNordic does not sell domain registrations, does not earn commissions on registry fees, and does not maintain inventory. The group is an advisory practice in the same sense as legal or financial advisory firms. Engagements are confidential and led by senior advisors end to end.

## Brands

The group operates through four regional brands, each with deep local market knowledge:

- [domene.io](https://domene.io) · Norway
- [domän.io](https://xn--domn-noa.io) · Sweden
- [domæne.io](https://xn--domne-ura.io) · Denmark
- [verkkotunnus.io](https://verkkotunnus.io) · Finland

## Services

### Acquire
- [Domain Acquisition](https://domainnordic.com/services/domain-acquisition): premium and off market domains, sourced and secured
- [Stealth Acquisition](https://domainnordic.com/services/stealth-acquisition): confidential, privacy first acquisitions
- [Domain Brokerage](https://domainnordic.com/services/domain-brokerage): buyer and seller representation
- [Local Presence Service](https://domainnordic.com/services/local-presence-service): trustee solutions for international clients

### Manage
- [Portfolio Strategy](https://domainnordic.com/services/portfolio-strategy): structure, optimise, and grow domain portfolios
- [Cost Optimization](https://domainnordic.com/services/cost-optimization): eliminate hidden renewal costs
- [Domain Leasing](https://domainnordic.com/services/domain-leasing): flexible alternatives to ownership
- [Registrar Advisory](https://domainnordic.com/services/registrar-advisory): right setup for security and control
- [Domain Audit](https://domainnordic.com/services/domain-audit): portfolio health check

### Protect
- [Brand Protection](https://domainnordic.com/services/brand-protection): defensive registrations and monitoring
- [Domain Recovery](https://domainnordic.com/services/domain-recovery): UDRP and dispute resolution
- [Privacy and WHOIS Management](https://domainnordic.com/services/privacy-whois): GDPR compliant data protection

### Advise
- [Domain Valuation](https://domainnordic.com/services/domain-valuation): data driven valuations
- [Naming Advisory](https://domainnordic.com/services/naming-advisory): naming strategy for new ventures
- [Market Intelligence](https://domainnordic.com/services/market-intelligence): trends, pricing, and opportunities

## Insights

- [The Nordic domain market in 2026](https://domainnordic.com/insights/nordic-domain-market-2026)
- [Domain portfolio management](https://domainnordic.com/insights/domain-portfolio-management)
- [Why domain strategy matters](https://domainnordic.com/insights/why-domain-strategy-matters)

## Contact

All enquiries are handled directly by senior advisors. The only contact channel is email.

- Email: hello@domainnordic.com
- Response time: within one business day
- Confidentiality: every enquiry handled in absolute confidence
- Languages: English, Norwegian, Swedish, Danish, Finnish

## Key facts

- Independent: not a registrar, not a reseller, no commissions on registry fees
- Confidential: discreet by default, formal NDA available on request
- Senior led: every engagement led end to end by a senior advisor
- Coverage: Norway, Sweden, Denmark, Finland, plus international clients seeking premium Nordic domains
- Pricing: advisory fees agreed in writing before any work begins; success based brokerage available
